studyName: NHLBI TOPMed: Coronary Artery Risk Development in Young Adults (CARDIA)

tables.description: This sample attributes table for methylation samples includes Primary biosample type, analyte type, analyte isolated, collection details (n=3 variables; collection year, age at collection, collection visit), analyte isolation year, analyte isolation lab, alternate IDs (n=7 variables; analyte sample ID, UBERON_ID, UBERON term, material isolation batch ID, analyte isolation batch ID, sample container ID, sample well ID), processing details (n=7 variables; assay lab, assay batch, barcode, row col, SNPs read, decode date, extract date), and fraction of CpG sites that pass detection p-value thresholds (p.0.05, p.0.01).

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured from the submitted sample

variables.name: Age_at_collection
variables.description: Subject age at time of primary biosample collection

variables.name: Analyte_isolated
variables.description: Type of analyte isolated from primary biosample or derived material

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_batch_ID
variables.description: Identifier for analyte isolation batch

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_lab
variables.description: Name of laboratory performing the analyte isolation

variables.name: Analyte_isolation_year
variables.description: Year in which analyte was isolated

variables.name: Analyte_sample_ID
variables.description: Identifier for analyte isolated from primary biosample

variables.name: Assay_batch
variables.description: Data processing batch

variables.name: Assay_lab
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Barcode
variables.description: Illumina chip Sentrix barcode

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit at which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: The primary biosample type

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample

variables.name: Material_isolation_batch_ID
variables.description: Identifier for material isolation batch

variables.name: Primary_biosample_type
variables.description: Type of primary biosample

variables.name: RowCol
variables.description: Illumina chip assay position

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: DNA methylation sample identifier

variables.name: Sample_container_ID
variables.description: Identifier for sample plate for shipping samples to assay center

variables.name: Sample_well_ID
variables.description: Identifier for well of the sample shipment container

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_Term
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

variables.name: decodeDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'AutoDecode' action in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably related to the chip manufacturing date.

variables.name: extractDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'Scan', 'Register' and 'Extract' actions in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably date when the chip was scanned after hybridization, extension and staining.

variables.name: nSNPsRead
variables.description: Value reported as 'nSNPsRead' in Illumina .idat file header

variables.name: p.0.01
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.01

variables.name: p.0.05
variables.description: Fraction of CpG sites which pass a detection p-value threshold of 0.05

tables.description: This sample attributes table for metabolomics data includes body site, histological type, tumor status, analyte type, primary biosample type, age at collection, collection year, collection visit, fasting status, and fasting hours.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of omics assay to be performed

variables.name: Age_at_collection
variables.description: Subject's age in years at time of tissue collection

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Collection_visit
variables.description: Study visit when the primary biosample was collected (relevant for longitudianal studies with multiple waves of clinic visits). Y = Year. Duplicates are indicated with "_dup" suffix

variables.name: Collection_year
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected (if not known can note as NA but Age_at_collection is required)

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue subtype derived from the Primary biosample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample

variables.name: Primary_biosample_type
variables.description: Specifies the type of the primary biosample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: TOPMed identifier for each sample aliquot sent to the omics assay center

variables.name: fasting
variables.description: Fasting status

variables.name: fasting_hours
variables.description: Duration of fasting in hours

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site, analyte type, tumor status, sequencing center, funding source, TOPMed phase, project, and study name.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: Funding_Source
variables.description: Project funding source

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: Study_Name
variables.description: TOPMed-assigned short study name (1:1 with TOPMed phs number)

variables.name: TOPMed_Phase
variables.description: TOPMed Phase

variables.name: TOPMed_Project
variables.description: TOPMed Project that funded sequencing

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
